w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh wp14

w:r.w:t: Creating Gate pass Request Number and Gate Pass number for RGP and NRGP types
Creating Gate Pass Request Number for NRGP & RGP
Creating Gate Pass Number for NRGP & RGP against request number
Creating Gate Pass Request Number for NRGP & RGP
Maintain Basic authorization and provide SAP DEV login credentials
value to fetch and send request.
Go to headers tab to find X-CSRF-TOKEN
using POST request using above X-CSRF-TOKEN in header.
pass type is same and Return date is mandatory to create Request number for RGP
Assuming Gate Pass request number is approved at all Levels.
Creating Gate Pass Number against above request
Maintain Gate pass request number generated in payload of Gate Pass number.
